metadata.name: Universal Enterprise Ontology Core
metadata.description: 适用于所有企业的组织通用 ontology 核心，定义了跨行业、跨企业的核心概念、关系与实例。v2.0 引入抽象域根类、泛型关系与版本演进机制。
metadata.description_en: Universal organization ontology core applicable to all enterprises. v2.0 introduces abstract domain roots, generalized relations, and lifecycle management.

classes.definition: 所有可被识别和管理的事物的顶层抽象
classes.definition_en: Top-level abstraction for all identifiable and manageable things

classes.definition: 可参与业务关系与治理关系的主体总类
classes.definition_en: The superclass of all entities that can participate in business and governance relationships

classes.definition: 自然人主体
classes.definition_en: A natural person entity

classes.definition: 法人或非法人组织
classes.definition_en: A legal or non-legal organization entity

classes.definition: 部门、团队、委员会、项目群等组织内部单元
classes.definition_en: Internal organizational units such as departments, teams, committees, and program groups

classes.definition: 被业务过程创建、变更、管理、消费的有形或无形资源
classes.definition_en: Tangible or intangible resources created, modified, managed, or consumed by business processes

classes.definition: 企业对外提供或内部使用的产品和服务对象
classes.definition_en: Products and services provided externally or used internally by an enterprise

classes.definition: 财务、实物、知识、数据、品牌等资产
classes.definition_en: Financial, physical, knowledge, data, brand, and other assets

classes.definition: 结构化或非结构化的数据实体
classes.definition_en: A structured or unstructured data entity

classes.definition: 合同、报告、文件、单据、记录
classes.definition_en: Contracts, reports, files, documents, and records

classes.definition: 支撑流程、数据和决策的软件系统
classes.definition_en: Software systems supporting processes, data, and decision-making

classes.definition: 用于约束、治理和风险管控的抽象域
classes.definition_en: Abstract domain for constraints, governance, and risk management

classes.definition: 管理原则与约束要求
classes.definition_en: Management principles and constraint requirements

classes.definition: 可执行、可判断的业务或控制规则
classes.definition_en: Executable and evaluable business or control rules

classes.definition: 用于降低风险、保障合规和质量的控制措施
classes.definition_en: Control measures to reduce risk and ensure compliance and quality

classes.definition: 可能影响目标实现的不确定事件或状态
classes.definition_en: Uncertain events or conditions that may affect goal achievement

classes.definition: 描述组织运作方式的抽象域，包含角色、能力、流程与事件
classes.definition_en: Abstract domain describing how an organization operates, including roles, capabilities, processes, and events

classes.definition: 主体在某一上下文中承担的身份或职责
classes.definition_en: An identity or responsibility assumed by a party in a given context

classes.definition: 组织稳定具备且可被复用的业务能力
classes.definition_en: A stable and reusable business capability possessed by an organization

classes.definition: 为实现业务目标而定义的端到端活动序列，可通过 part_of 关系表达子活动
classes.definition_en: An end-to-end sequence of activities defined to achieve business objectives; sub-activities expressed via part_of relation

classes.definition: 发生在业务或技术环境中的状态变化
classes.definition_en: A state change occurring in the business or technical environment

classes.definition: 描述目标设定与绩效衡量的抽象域
classes.definition_en: Abstract domain for goal-setting and performance measurement

classes.definition: 组织希望达成的结果
classes.definition_en: Outcomes an organization aims to achieve

classes.definition: 衡量目标达成程度的指标
classes.definition_en: Metrics that measure the degree of goal achievement

attributes.definition: 实体的正式名称，所有子类继承
attributes.definition_en: Formal name of the entity; inherited by all subclasses

attributes.definition: 对实体的自由文本描述

attributes.definition_en: Date when the policy becomes effective
Target numeric value for the KPI

attributes.definition: KPI 的计量单位（如百分比、金额、数量）
attributes.definition_en: Unit of measurement for the KPI (e.g., percentage, currency, count)

attributes.definition: 标识流程是否已自动化
attributes.definition_en: Indicates whether the process is automated

relations.definition_en: A party plays a specific role

relations.definition: 一个实体是另一个实体的组成部分（合并了 belongs_to 和 composed_of）
relations.definition_en: An entity is part of another entity (unifies belongs_to and composed_of)
A party owns or is responsible for a resource

relations.definition: 角色对运营元素（能力、流程等）负责
relations.definition_en: A role is accountable for an operational element (capability, process, etc.)
A capability is realized by a process
A data object is recorded in a system application

relations.definition: 运营元素受治理要素约束（泛化了原 governed_by 和 constrained_by）
relations.definition_en: An operational element is governed by a governance element (generalizes both governed_by and constrained_by)
A risk is mitigated by a control measure

relations.definition: 运营元素由指标衡量（泛化了原 Goal→KPI 的限制）
relations.definition_en: An operational element is measured by a KPI (generalizes the former Goal-only constraint)

relations.definition: 关键指标用于评估特定业务目标的达成情况
relations.definition_en: A KPI evaluates the achievement of a specific business goal

migration_registry.note: BusinessObject was overly broad; replaced by Resource as a more precise abstract parent
Simplified naming; Document conveys the same semantics
Sub-activities are now expressed via part_of relation on Process; no standalone class needed
Demoted to L2 common extension; not universally applicable to all enterprises
Demoted to L2 common extension; marketing-domain concept
Demoted to L2 common extension; can be modeled as an attribute or a common extension
Can be modeled as an Event subtype in L2; semantically a state change
Merged into part_of as a general-purpose containment relation
Merged into part_of as a general-purpose containment relation
Renamed to governed_by for semantic clarity
Expressible via measured_by inverse reasoning or Goal-Capability mapping in L2
Decision demoted to L2; expressible as Event subtype

axioms.definition: 一个实例不能同时是人员和组织
axioms.definition_en: An instance cannot be both a Person and an Organization

axioms.label_zh: 实体域与治理域不相交
axioms.label_en: Entity and Governance domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 实体域和治理域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Entity domain and Governance domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.label_zh: 实体域与运营域不相交
axioms.label_en: Entity and Operational domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 实体域和运营域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Entity domain and Operational domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.label_zh: 实体域与度量域不相交
axioms.label_en: Entity and Measurement domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 实体域和度量域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Entity domain and Measurement domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.label_zh: 治理域与运营域不相交
axioms.label_en: Governance and Operational domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 治理域和运营域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Governance domain and Operational domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.label_zh: 治理域与度量域不相交
axioms.label_en: Governance and Measurement domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 治理域和度量域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Governance domain and Measurement domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.label_zh: 运营域与度量域不相交
axioms.label_en: Operational and Measurement domains are disjoint
axioms.definition: 运营域和度量域的实例互斥
axioms.definition_en: Operational domain and Measurement domain instances are mutually exclusive

axioms.definition: 一个实例不能同时是政策和规则
axioms.definition_en: An instance cannot be both a Policy and a Rule

axioms.definition: 如果 A 是 B 的一部分，B 是 C 的一部分，则 A 是 C 的一部分
axioms.definition_en: If A is part of B and B is part of C, then A is part of C

axioms.definition: 如果 A 是 B 的一部分，则 B 不能是 A 的一部分
axioms.definition_en: If A is part of B, then B cannot be part of A

axioms.label_zh: 只有主体可以拥有资源
axioms.label_en: Only Party subclasses can own Resources
axioms.definition: owns 关系的域限制为 Party 子类，值域限制为 Resource 子类
axioms.definition_en: The owns relation is restricted to Party subclasses as domain and Resource subclasses as range

axioms.label_zh: governed_by 的值域必须是治理子类
axioms.label_en: governed_by range restricted to Governance subclasses
axioms.definition: 所有通过 governed_by 关联的对象必须是 Governance 域的子类
axioms.definition_en: All objects linked via governed_by must be subclasses of the Governance domain

axioms.label_zh: 每个能力必须由流程实现
axioms.label_en: Every Capability must be realized by some Process
axioms.definition: 每个能力至少由一个流程实现
axioms.definition_en: Every Capability is realized by at least one Process

axioms.label_zh: 每个风险必须有控制措施
axioms.label_en: Every Risk must be mitigated by some Control
axioms.definition: 每个风险至少由一个控制措施缓释
axioms.definition_en: Every Risk is mitigated by at least one Control measure

axioms.label_zh: 每个KPI必须衡量某个运营元素
axioms.label_en: Every KPI must measure some Operational element
axioms.definition: 每个关键指标至少关联一个被衡量的运营元素
axioms.definition_en: Every KPI is linked to at least one Operational element it measures

axioms.label_en: Organization has at least one Role
axioms.definition: 每个组织至少扮演一个角色
axioms.definition_en: Every Organization plays at least one Role

axioms.label_zh: composed_of 是 part_of 的子属性
axioms.label_en: composed_of is a subproperty of part_of
axioms.definition: 组成关系是部分关系的特化形式
axioms.definition_en: The composition relation is a specialization of the part-of relation

axioms.label_zh: 每个角色必须被某个主体扮演
axioms.label_en: Every Role is played by some Party
axioms.definition: 每个角色至少被一个主体扮演
axioms.definition_en: Every Role is played by at least one Party

axioms.label_zh: 每个KPI必须评估某个目标
axioms.label_en: Every KPI must evaluate some Goal
axioms.definition: 每个关键指标至少关联一个其试图评估的目标
axioms.definition_en: Every KPI evaluates at least one Goal
